recentArticles.title: 'No Kings' protests sweep US as critics slam Donald Trump deportations, Iran war - The Jerusalem Post
recentArticles.snippet: Police officers clear the street outside a federal building after a "No Kings" protest against U.S. President Donald Trump's administration policies, in Los Angeles, California, US March 28, 2026. Demonstrators decrying US President Donald Trump's aggressive deportation efforts, war in Iran and other policies took to city streets across the country on Saturday in the third round of the "No Kings" rallies. Large rallies took place in New York, Dallas, Philadelphia and Washington, but two-thirds of No Kings events were happening outside major cities, a nearly 40% jump for smaller communities from the movement's first mobilization last June, organizers said. Actor Robert De Niro, one of the organizers, said that no president before Trump has posed "such an existential threat to our freedoms and security.”. Trump's policies have galvanized the opposition, Dallas protester Chris Brendel said. Morgan Taylor, 45, attending the Washington protest with her 12-year-old son, said she was enraged by Trump's military action in Iran, which she called a "stupid war.".

recentArticles.title: EXCLUSIVE: Inside the Making of BTS’ ‘Arirange’ Comeback Show Costumes with Designer Jay Songzio - WWD
recentArticles.snippet: The Korean designer collaborated with the group and each member to create characters for the historical concert. **PARIS –** When BTS took the stage at 8 p.m. Korean time on Saturday night, millions of fans around the world tuned in to witness all seven members reunited for the first time in years – a highly anticipated event already being framed as one of the most important musical moments of the year. The group appeared in custom looks by Korean designer Jay Songzio, whose Songzio label crafted an exclusive collection for the comeback show, blending historical references with an avant-garde edge. So mixing this kind of very fluid silhouettes and design with armor-like details, we tried to create this collection. But then oftentimes, when we prepare a collection for Paris, for example, we add a lot of Korean references, and then we try to soften it a bit, whether it’s for commercial reasons or sometimes for aesthetic reasons. **Songzio:** A lot of ornamental aspects – whether it’s extra studs to make them look even more like armor.

recentArticles.title: How Korea Took Over the World - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: James Shin, president of film and TV at HYBE America,  the U.S. arm of the entertainment company behind K-pop sensations BTS, Seventeen and Le Sserafim — and a producer on an upcoming, still-untitled Paramount K-pop film — sees that discipline baked into the Korean production system itself. Part of what has made K-culture’s American breakthrough so seamless is that so much of it is now made by Americans — Korean Americans who grew up with a foot in both worlds and the instincts to navigate between them. Kang noted that *Demon Hunters*’ visual style was consciously shaped by her lifelong love of anime and manhwa — Korean comics and graphic novels — and executed with careful attention to Korean linguistic and cultural nuances, even though the film’s lingua franca is American English.

recentArticles.title: ‘Comeback of the century’: K-pop phenomenon BTS returns with first concert in years - CNN
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Comeback of the century’: K-pop phenomenon BTS returns with first concert in years. At the heart of BTS’ comeback is a free, public concert in Seoul for their most dedicated fans. The one-hour concert is part of a promotional tour for BTS’ new fifth full-length studio album, “Arirang.” Released the day prior and named after a Korean traditional folk song that serves as the country’s unofficial national anthem, it explores themes like personal identity and belonging. Fans of BTS cheer ahead of the band's comeback as they wait near the concert venue in central Seoul on March 21, 2026. BTS’ new album has sparked much discussion around the meanings behind its name, “Arirang.” The Korean song, which it is named after, is believed to have originated during at least the Joseon Dynasty (1392–1910) and comes in hundreds of variations. “With the midterm elections coming out soon in Korea, some politicians see the concert as a good PR opportunity… and are using it to highlight their achievements, even though they haven’t done anything (to get BTS to perform),” she said.

recentArticles.title: BTS Kicks Off First Group Performance in Over Three Years With Netflix Live Stream - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # BTS Kicks Off First Group Performance in Over Three Years With Netflix Live Stream. Put your phone down, let’s get all the fun.” Or the maybe not the whole stadium, but the whole gathered crowd at Seoul landmark Gwanghwamun, which has been outfitted for the grand return of the groundbreaking K-pop group, BTS. Fresh off the release of their fifth studio album, Arirang, the seven members of BTS — RM, Jin, Suga, J-hope, Jimin, V and Jungkook — kicked off their first group live performance in over three years, *BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang*, Saturday night in Seoul. *BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang* marks the first-ever live stream of a standalone concert for Netflix. “We’re really pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in the live concert broadcast world.”. “It really takes an army of production veterans — plus BTS Army, of course — to make this happen,” Mussman added.

recentArticles.title: Kangmin Finds His Balance With Solo Debut Album ‘Free Falling’ - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: Despite the name of Kangmin’s debut solo album and title track, *Free Falling*, the 23-year-old K-pop artist has been feeling quite the opposite lately. “I wanted to talk about what I was going through, and my emotions of going through those situations at the time of preparing for this album,” Kangmin says over Zoom from Seoul. “There was a bit of the emotion of anxiousness within feeling happy, so I wanted to come across as very honest with my fans through this album.”. The title track, “Free Falling,” is a contemporary R&B-pop song he wrote that depicts a couple in a turbulent relationship, going through a cycle of love and pain, and how this constant push-and-pull causes him to lose control and essentially free-fall. The final track in the album, “in the mirror,” is a mid-tempo pop song about ignoring your emotions, but realizing that it is time to face your reflection and accept it.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Announces Self Titled Album - TotalNtertainment
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Announces Self Titled Album. Award–winning R&B powerhouse Kehlani announces the arrival of her highly anticipated new self titled album, Kehlani, set for release on April 24. A self-titled album is often an artist’s most personal statement, and Kehlani is no exception. To date, she has earned over 20 gold and platinum RIAA certifications, tallied more than 5 billion streams, and is now a 2x GRAMMY® Award–winning, 7x GRAMMY® Award–nominated artist, taking home Best R&B Performance and Best R&B Song for her global hit “Folded”. She ushered in a new era and dominated the cultural conversation with her 2025 single “Folded,” a soaring anthem that has amassed over 800 million global streams, peaked at #6 on Billboard’s Hot 100, and reached #1 at Urban Radio (for 9 weeks) as well as hit #1 at Rhythmic and R&B Radio. Kehlani also earned her first solo Billboard #1 on the Rhythmic Airplay Chart, claimed the top spot on Apple Music’s R&B charts in both the U.S. and U.K., and reached #22 on Billboard’s Global 200.

She also says Branca’s lack of experience producing' films “may be the root of reports that the estate has had to fund tens of millions of dollars in reshoots after the terms of a well-known settlement agreement prevented the production from using substantial amounts of footage already shot.” Paris said she was concerned it was a “botched production on a” 3.5-hour biopic “which the estate has reportedly invested at least some, if not all of the $150 million budget, is troubling, to say the least.”. Paris also claimed McClain and Branca used the estate funds to invest in risky projects.

recentArticles.title: Meet Carolyn Bessette’s ex before JFK Jr: 'Baywatch' star once said she ‘still loved me’ after marriage - Fox News
recentArticles.snippet: ## Michael Bergin dated Carolyn Bessette in the early 1990s, prior to her relationship with JFK Jr. By Lori A Bashian  Fox News. Also, portrayed in the show is Michael Bergin, a former Calvin Klein model who dated Bessette prior to her relationship with JFK Jr. Bergin dated Bessette prior to her marriage to JFK Jr. Here is everything you need to know about Bessette's other big romance. In his 2004 book, "The Other Man: A Love Story," Bergin claimed that he and Bessette continued to see each other after her September 1996 marriage to JFK Jr. During an appearance on "Paula Zahn Now" in 2004, Bergin spoke about why he chose to write a book about his relationship with Bessette, saying since someone else wrote about it first "like they knew what they were talking about," he "wanted to put an end to all this" and get "closure." He was likely referring to the 2000 book, "The Day John Died," written by Christopher Andersen.

recentArticles.title: Police video of Justin Timberlake's 2024 drunken driving arrest released - NBC New York
recentArticles.snippet: # Police video of Justin Timberlake's 2024 drunken driving arrest released. ## Timberlake's lawyers had sued to block the release of the video, arguing it would “devastate” Timberlake’s privacy by revealing “intimate, highly personal, and sensitive details.”. Justin Timberlake struggled to perform field sobriety tests requiring him to walk a straight line and stand on one leg after he was pulled over in New York’s Hamptons in 2024 by police officers who suspected him of driving drunk, according to video footage released Friday. When an officer asks why he is in town, Timberlake says, “I’m on a world tour.”. ### Justin Timberlake sues to block release of police video from 2024 drunken driving arrest in NY. Timberlake's lawyers had sued to block the release of the video, arguing it would “devastate” Timberlake’s privacy by revealing “intimate, highly personal, and sensitive details.” They also said it would cause “severe and irreparable harm” to his reputation by subjecting him to “public ridicule and harassment.”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導賈斯汀·提姆布萊克酒駕逮捕影片的釋出。

recentArticles.title: Video Shows Justin Timberlake Struggling Through DUI Tests: ‘Really Hard’ - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: Newly released police video shows Justin Timberlake struggling through roadside sobriety tests during his 2024 drunken driving arrest in New York’s Hamptons. *Newsweek* also contacted the Police Department of Sag Harbor, New York, to request the full arrest footage. Timberlake told police he had consumed one martini and said he was following friends home in the former whaling village, one of the Hamptons’ affluent beach towns, about 100 miles east of New York City. When an officer asked why he was in town, Timberlake replied, “I’m on a world tour.”. The footage was released after Sag Harbor Village and Timberlake’s legal team agreed to disclose a redacted version in response to public records requests. The *Associated Press* and other media outlets had sought the video under New York’s Freedom of Information Law. Timberlake’s lawyers initially sued to block the release, arguing the footage would expose “intimate, highly personal, and sensitive details” and cause “severe and irreparable harm” to his reputation by subjecting him to public ridicule.

recentArticles.title: DeleteMe acquires social media security tool Block Party - TechCrunch
recentArticles.snippet: # DeleteMe acquires social media security tool Block Party. Block Party founder Tracy Chou announced on Wednesday that the company has been acquired by DeleteMe, an online personal data removal service. A software engineer and advocate for diversity in tech, Chou founded Block Party in 2018 as a tool to help people stay safe from targeted harassment on Twitter, inspired by her own experiences on the platform. Under his ownership, the company began charging for access to its API, but the costs were too steep for a startup like Block Party to operate, so Block Party was forced to quickly pivot and launch tools for other platforms. ### Save up to $300 or 30% to TechCrunch Founder Summit. #### 1,000+ **founders** and investors come together at **TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026** for a full day focused on growth, execution, and real-world scaling. For current Block Party users, nothing will change for now — as the tool becomes more integrated into DeleteMe at large, the company says it will share more with customers.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導DeleteMe收購社群媒體安全工具Block Party，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Box Office: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Rockets to $33 Million - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Box Office: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Rockets to $33 Million. Phil Lord and Christopher Miller’s “Project Hail Mary” earned $33 million domestically on Friday from 4,007 locations. The sci-fi drama is expected to blast off to $77 million by Sunday, which marks the best opening for Amazon MGM ever, legging out 2023’s “Creed III” ($58 million). Disney and Pixar’s “Hoppers” landed in second place on Friday with $5.4 million domestically. Searchlight Pictures’ “Ready or Not 2: Here I Come” came in third place on Friday, pulling in $3.8 million domestically from 3,010 locations. The No. 4 slot went to the Indian action epic “Dhurandhar The Revenge,” which made an estimated $3 million on Friday from just 987 North American theaters. The film is projected to gross $10.9 million by Sunday. Fifth place went to Universal’s “Reminders of Him,” which added $2.7 million domestically on its second Friday in theaters. The teary romance is expected to gross $8.7 million by Sunday, pushing its North American total to a solid $33 million.

recentArticles.title: The Wailers and The Pogues Confirm Australian Tours Despite Bluesfest Collapse - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # The Wailers and The Pogues Confirm Australian Tours Despite Bluesfest Collapse. Both acts have announced updated routing — The Wailers with a new run of East Coast dates and The Pogues adding a Brisbane show. Two more acts from the cancelled Bluesfest 2026 lineup have confirmed they are pressing ahead with their Australian tours. The Wailers and The Pogues both announced updated plans on Saturday (March 21), joining Sublime and Counting Crows in reassuring fans that their runs would continue despite the Easter festival’s collapse. The Wailers have announced a new string of intimate East Coast dates, now presented by Noisy Group, with shows in Gosford, Sydney, Port Macquarie, Coffs Harbour and Brunswick Heads running through Easter weekend. The band’s 2026 tour marks the 50th anniversary of *Rastaman Vibration* — Bob Marley’s landmark 1976 album that represented the commercial breakthrough of reggae in the United States. The Pogues have also confirmed their Australian and New Zealand tour is going ahead as planned, adding a new Brisbane show at Fortitude Music Hall on April 2.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要報導The Wailers和The Pogues樂團確認將在澳洲巡演，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: New Kids on the Block Thrill Fans with 2026 Tour Buzz: Germany Dates Incoming and Tickets Flying Fas - AD HOC NEWS
recentArticles.snippet: # New Kids on the Block Thrill Fans with 2026 Tour Buzz: Germany Dates Incoming and Tickets Flying Fast for Epic Comeback Shows. You won't believe the excitement exploding online as New Kids on the Block drop hints of massive 2026 tour expansion into Europe, with Germany fans heartbroken yet hopeful for dates in Berlin and Munich. **New Kids on the Block are back, and Germany fans, you are losing your minds right now.** Just hours ago on March 21, 2026, the band's official tour page lit up with fresh updates showing North American dates selling out in record time, fueling massive hype that their magic is heading your way next. This isn't hype for hype's sake—the official NKOTB tour page confirms 15+ U.S. shows already at capacity, with more announcements promised 'imminently.' Fans in DACH are united, sharing old concert vids and pleading #NKOTBtoGermany. Promoter Live Nation Germany's history with NKOTB includes past sellouts, and their site teases '2026 international dates TBA.' Cross-checked with Eventim.de—no listings, but presale alerts are live for registered fans.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導New Kids on the Block樂團2026年巡演的相關消息。

recentArticles.title: Lily Allen West End Girl Concert Review: Bold Show Full of Feminine Rage - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: On Friday night, Lily Allen finally brought “West End Girl” to the West End. In a full-circle moment for the London-born singer-songwriter, the tour for her latest album — which, in case you were living under a rock, created lots of buzz for its no-holds-barred songwriting seemingly about her divorce from “Stranger Things” star David Harbour — found her back in the place that marked the beginning of the end of her relationship. Instead of having another artist open the concert, Allen enlisted three cellists — all brunette with bangs, strangely mirroring the singer — to play instrumental versions of some of her biggest hits like “LDN,” “It’s Not Fair,” “Smile” and “Fuck You.” Though some fans have expressed disappointment online that Allen isn’t including these songs in her setlist, that sentiment wasn’t present in the room — as lyrics flashed on a screen behind the cellists, the Palladium turned into a giggly, nostalgic sing-a-long that left the audience warmed up and ready to focus on “West End Girl.”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導英國歌手Lily Allen的「West End Girl」演唱會評論，內容聚焦於其音樂表現與個人情感表達。

recentArticles.title: Fetty Wap has a lot to say on 'Zavier.’ It’s his first album since being released from prison - Greenwich Time
recentArticles.snippet: During that time, he thought about everything he missed: his family, his kids, the sound of a car engine as he drives, food — “I love to eat,” he told The Associated Press — and, of course, music. Fun Fetty Wap abounds on “Zavier,” as does a serious Fetty Wap, a lustful Fetty Wap, a tender Fetty Wap. It's “a lot of different sounds up in there,” he says. “The whole ‘Zavier’ thing is just, like, bring back the same energy as the ‘Fetty Wap’ album,” he continued, referencing his 2015 breakthrough record — the one that brought the diamond-selling “Trap Queen” to the masses. I’m going to sound Max B and then I’m gonna make Max B sound like the old Max B,'” he said about the song “BossDon.” But it worked. He also looked toward his family for inspiration: Fetty Wap's sisters are featured on the album on the throwback “White Roses.”. “'White Roses' is actually my favorite track,” says Fetty Wap.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導美國饒舌歌手Fetty Wap發行新專輯《Zavier》，內容與周杰倫無關。

latestReport.daily_summary: 根據今日搜集到的新聞內容，並無任何關於華語流行天王周杰倫的相關報導。新聞列表中多處提及的『Jay-Z』均是指美國饒舌歌手Jay-Z，請留意兩位藝人名字的區別。因此，今日無周杰倫的焦點新聞可供摘要。
